business.name: Sanders Plumbing Service Inc.
business.tagline: Fast, Reliable Plumbing Solutions Since Day One

hero.headline: *24/7 Emergency Plumbing* - Augusta's Most Trusted Service
hero.subheadline: From burst pipes to clogged drains, we fix it right the first time. Licensed plumbers ready to respond when you need us most.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Plumbing Solutions
services_section.subheading: Professional service for every plumbing need in your home or business

services.title: Emergency Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Burst pipes, major leaks, and plumbing emergencies fixed fast. Our team responds 24/7 to prevent water damage and restore your plumbing system.

services.title: Drain Cleaning & Unclogging
services.description: Professional drain cleaning for kitchen sinks, bathrooms, and main lines. We clear tough clogs and restore proper flow using advanced equipment.

services.title: Water Heater Service
services.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance for all water heater types. From tankless to traditional units, we keep your hot water flowing reliably.

services.title: Fixture Installation
services.description: Professional installation of faucets, toilets, sinks, and showers. Upgrade your bathroom or kitchen with quality fixtures installed properly.

services.title: Leak Detection & Repair
services.description: Advanced leak detection services to find hidden water leaks. We locate and repair leaks quickly to prevent costly water damage.

about.heading: Serving Augusta Families Since Our Founding
about.body: Sanders Plumbing Service Inc. has been Augusta's go-to plumbing contractor for residential and commercial needs. Our licensed plumbers combine years of experience with modern equipment to deliver reliable solutions across the CSRA region. We're committed to honest pricing, quality workmanship, and building lasting relationships with our neighbors.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Called Sanders at 11 PM when our main line backed up into the basement. They arrived within an hour and had everything cleared by 2 AM. Saved us from a nightmare cleanup situation.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Replaced our old water heater in December. The technician explained all our options and installed the new unit the same day. Hot showers never felt so good!

reviews.name: Linda K.
reviews.text: Kitchen faucet started leaking badly on Friday evening. Sanders came out Saturday morning, fixed it in 30 minutes, and charged exactly what they quoted. Professional service.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving the Greater Augusta Area
service_areas.subheading: Fast, reliable plumbing service throughout the CSRA region

cta.heading: Need Plumbing Service Today?
cta.body: Don't let plumbing problems disrupt your day. Our experienced team is ready to diagnose and fix your issue quickly.
